name: Lunaris OS
tagline: Unofficial Android 16 QPR2 with better feel, faster motion, and a much cleaner pacmanpro flashing flow.
maintenanceNote: Current focus: haptics, speed, and easier flashing on pacmanpro
highlights: Improved haptics make the whole build feel crisper in daily use.
App opening and closing animations are faster, smoother, and more responsive overall.
The pacmanpro flashing process is no longer as complicated as before.
changelog: Improved haptics for a sharper and more tactile feel.
Improved app opening and closing animations along with overall speed.
Included ViperFX for better audio quality.
GApps are included by default, while Fenrir still needs to be added separately.
Play Integrity is strong with Fenrir as of March 28, 2026.
A clean flash is mandatory for this build.
